attributes.Sql Query:
SELECT 
EOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID,                  
EOXEL.LAST_UPDATED_BY ,              
EOXEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
EOXEL.CREATED_BY  ,                  
EOXEL.CREATION_DATE  ,               
EOXEL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID ,         
EOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID ,              
EOXEL.XXCCP_LINE_ID ,                
EOXEL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID,               
EOXEL.QUOTE_LINE_ID,                 
EOXEL.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,              
EOXEL.ORDER_HEADER_ID,               
EOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID ,                
EOXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE ,                
EOXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION ,            
EOXEL.ERROR_DATE ,                   
EOXEL.ERROR_TYPE ,                   
EOXEL.ERROR_STATUS ,                 
EOXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION,           
EOXEL.ERROR_STAGE ,                  
EOXEL.ERROR_SUB_STAGE  ,             
EOXEL.OPERATION_CODE ,               
EOXEL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
EOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
EOXEL.BATCH_ID,                      
EOXEL.CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
EOXEL.ACTION_CODE                   
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG  EOXEL WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SOXEL  WHERE EOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID= SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID 
AND EOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME=SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SOXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,SOXEL_BK.SS_CODE,SOXEL_BK.SS_TABLE_CD)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,
SOXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
SOXEL_BK.SS_CODE SS_CD,
SOXEL_BK.SS_TABLE_CD SS_TABLE_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE	,
'ICW' SS_TABLE_CD
FROM $$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SOXEL  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME 
)  SOXEL_BK,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
		FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK ) SMHDR_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK SCS 
WHERE 	SCS.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT =SOXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT 
AND SCS.SS_CD =SOXEL_BK.SS_CODE
AND SCS.SS_TABLE_CD='ICW'
)
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  
	(
	SELECT 
	EOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID			SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
	EOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME				GLOBAL_NAME			
	FROM  
	$$EXCEPDB.EX_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG EOXEL  
	)EXCEP_BK
	WHERE 	EXCEP_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT =SOXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT  
	AND (CASE 
    		WHEN EXCEP_BK.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' 
    		WHEN EXCEP_BK.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' 
    END)= SOXEL_BK.SS_CODE
)

SELECT 
SOXEL .ERROR_LOG_ID,                  
SOXEL .LAST_UPDATED_BY ,              
SOXEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
SOXEL.CREATED_BY  ,                  
SOXEL.CREATION_DATE  ,               
SOXEL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID ,         
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID ,              
SOXEL.XXCCP_LINE_ID ,                
SOXEL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID,               
SOXEL.QUOTE_LINE_ID,                 
SOXEL.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,              
SOXEL.ORDER_HEADER_ID,               
SOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID ,                
SOXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE ,                
SOXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION ,            
SOXEL.ERROR_DATE ,                   
SOXEL.ERROR_TYPE ,                   
SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS ,                 
SOXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION,           
SOXEL.ERROR_STAGE ,                  
SOXEL.ERROR_SUB_STAGE  ,             
SOXEL.OPERATION_CODE ,               
SOXEL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
SOXEL.BATCH_ID,                      
SOXEL.CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
SOXEL.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                  
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG  SOXEL 
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER EOXOH
WHERE 
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID )
/*OR NOT EXISTS 
(SEL 1 FROM $$SLSORDVWDB.N_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK NCSOT
WHERE 
SOXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID = NCSOT.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT
AND
CASE WHEN SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'BO' THEN 'BV' END = NCSOT.SS_CD
AND
NCSOT.SS_TABLE_CD = 'ICW')*/
UNION 
SELECT 
SOXEL .ERROR_LOG_ID,                  
SOXEL .LAST_UPDATED_BY ,              
SOXEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE ,             
SOXEL.CREATED_BY  ,                  
SOXEL.CREATION_DATE  ,               
SOXEL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID ,         
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID ,              
SOXEL.XXCCP_LINE_ID ,                
SOXEL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID,               
SOXEL.QUOTE_LINE_ID,                 
SOXEL.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,              
SOXEL.ORDER_HEADER_ID,               
SOXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID ,                
SOXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE ,                
SOXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION ,            
SOXEL.ERROR_DATE ,                   
SOXEL.ERROR_TYPE ,                   
SOXEL.ERROR_STATUS ,                 
SOXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION,           
SOXEL.ERROR_STAGE ,                  
SOXEL.ERROR_SUB_STAGE  ,             
SOXEL.OPERATION_CODE ,               
SOXEL.GES_UPDATE_DATE,               
SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME ,                  
SOXEL.BATCH_ID,                      
SOXEL.CREATE_DATETIME  ,             
SOXEL.ACTION_CODE ,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                  
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_OM_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG  SOXEL ,
$$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER EOXOH
WHERE
SOXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID 
AND SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT 
WHERE EOXOH.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND CASE WHEN SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = 'UO' THEN 'QTC' WHEN SOXEL.GLOBAL_NAME='BO' THEN 'BV' END= NSOT.SS_CODE
)

SELECT 
ECXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID,
ECXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID,
ECXEL.XXCCP_LINE_ID,
ECXEL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID,
ECXEL.QUOTE_LINE_ID,
ECXEL.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,
ECXEL.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
ECXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
ECXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE,
ECXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION,
ECXEL.ERROR_DATE,
ECXEL.ERROR_TYPE,
ECXEL.ERROR_STATUS,
ECXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION,
ECXEL.ERROR_STAGE,
ECXEL.ERROR_SUB_STAGE,
ECXEL.OPERATION_CODE,
ECXEL.GLOBAL_NAME,
ECXEL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
ECXEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
ECXEL.CREATED_BY,
ECXEL.CREATION_DATE,
ECXEL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID,
ECXEL.CHANGE_HISTORY_ID,
ECXEL.ENTITY,
ECXEL.ELEMENT_NAME,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE1,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE2,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE3,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE4,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE5,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE6,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE7,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE8,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE9,
ECXEL.ATTRIBUTE10,
ECXEL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME 
FROM 
$$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG  ECXEL WHERE NOT EXISTS 
(SELECT 1 FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SCXEL  WHERE ECXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID= SCXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID 
AND ECXEL.GLOBAL_NAME=SCXEL.GLOBAL_NAME)

SELECT 
SCXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID,
SCXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID,
SCXEL.XXCCP_LINE_ID,
SCXEL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID,
SCXEL.QUOTE_LINE_ID,
SCXEL.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,
SCXEL.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
SCXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
SCXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE,
SCXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION,
SCXEL.ERROR_DATE,
SCXEL.ERROR_TYPE,
SCXEL.ERROR_STATUS,
SCXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION,
SCXEL.ERROR_STAGE,
SCXEL.ERROR_SUB_STAGE,
SCXEL.OPERATION_CODE,
SCXEL.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCXEL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SCXEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SCXEL.CREATED_BY,
SCXEL.CREATION_DATE,
SCXEL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID,
SCXEL.CHANGE_HISTORY_ID,
SCXEL.ENTITY,
SCXEL.ELEMENT_NAME,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE5,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE9,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE10,
SCXEL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                  
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SCXEL 
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER EOXOH
WHERE 
SCXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID )
UNION 
SELECT 
SCXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID,
SCXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID,
SCXEL.XXCCP_LINE_ID,
SCXEL.QUOTE_HEADER_ID,
SCXEL.QUOTE_LINE_ID,
SCXEL.WEB_ORDER_NUMBER,
SCXEL.ORDER_HEADER_ID,
SCXEL.ORDER_LINE_ID,
SCXEL.ERROR_MESSAGE,
SCXEL.ERROR_DESCRIPTION,
SCXEL.ERROR_DATE,
SCXEL.ERROR_TYPE,
SCXEL.ERROR_STATUS,
SCXEL.FOR_CSE_INTEGRATION,
SCXEL.ERROR_STAGE,
SCXEL.ERROR_SUB_STAGE,
SCXEL.OPERATION_CODE,
SCXEL.GLOBAL_NAME,
SCXEL.LAST_UPDATED_BY,
SCXEL.LAST_UPDATE_DATE,
SCXEL.CREATED_BY,
SCXEL.CREATION_DATE,
SCXEL.LAST_UPDATE_LOGIN_ID,
SCXEL.CHANGE_HISTORY_ID,
SCXEL.ENTITY,
SCXEL.ELEMENT_NAME,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE1,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE2,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE3,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE4,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE5,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE6,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE7,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE8,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE9,
SCXEL.ATTRIBUTE10,
SCXEL.SOURCE_COMMIT_TIME,
'RI' EXCEPTION_TYPE                  
FROM 
$$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG  SCXEL ,
$$ETLONLYDB.EL_OM_XXCCP_OE_ORDER_HEADER EOXOH
WHERE
SCXEL.XXCCP_HEADER_ID = EOXOH.XXCCP_HEADER_ID 
AND SCXEL.GLOBAL_NAME = EOXOH.GLOBAL_NAME
AND  NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM  $$SLSORDVWDB.N_SALES_ORDER_TV NSOT 
WHERE 
EOXOH.HEADER_ID = NSOT.SK_SALES_ORDER_HEADER_ID_INT
AND 
NSOT.SS_CODE = 'CG'
)

SELECT 
RANK() OVER (ORDER BY SCXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,SCXEL_BK.SS_CODE,SCXEL_BK.SS_TABLE_CD)  +  SMHDR_MAX.MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY,
SCXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
SCXEL_BK.SS_CODE SS_CD,
SCXEL_BK.SS_TABLE_CD SS_TABLE_CD,
CURRENT_TIMESTAMP(0) EDW_CREATE_DTM,
USER EDW_CREATE_USER
FROM 
(
SELECT DISTINCT
SCXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
NSSC.SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODE SS_CODE ,
'ICW' SS_TABLE_CD
FROM $$STGDB.ST_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG SCXEL  
INNER JOIN $$COMREFVWDB.N_SOURCE_SYSTEM_CODES NSSC 
ON NSSC.GLOBAL_NAME=SCXEL.GLOBAL_NAME 
)  SCXEL_BK,
(SELECT COALESCE(MAX(CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK_KEY),0) MAX_ORDER_SGK_VAL  
                                FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK ) SMHDR_MAX
WHERE NOT EXISTS
(
SELECT 1 FROM $$ETLVWDB.SM_CS_SALES_ORDER_TASK SCS 
WHERE                 SCS.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT =SCXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT 
AND SCS.SS_CD =SCXEL_BK.SS_CODE
AND SCS.SS_TABLE_CD='ICW'
)
AND  NOT EXISTS
(SELECT 1 FROM  
                (
                SELECT 
                ECXEL.ERROR_LOG_ID                                    SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT,
                ECXEL.GLOBAL_NAME                                                    GLOBAL_NAME                                 
                FROM  
                $$EXCEPDB.EX_CG1_XXCCP_ERROR_LOG ECXEL  
                )EXCEP_BK
                WHERE                 EXCEP_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT =SCXEL_BK.SK_ORDER_TASK_ID_INT  
                AND SCXEL_BK.SS_CODE = 'CG'
)
